message:
feat(dashboard): make new TUI dashboard the default

Change DashboardMode::default() from Legacy to New. The new FrankentUI-based
cockpit is now the default when running `sbh dashboard` with no flags.

Legacy dashboard remains available via `--legacy-dashboard` or
`dashboard.mode = "legacy"` in config. Kill switch still forces legacy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
